hc8f44dc4g024bg497eg8b2bgb8fbd98818d5: ... and over the horizon they saw a ship, like some great beast bursting from the waves.
hebfd2463g7fceg4cbbgb822geb50e605182e: The Wandering Eye, the jewel of Balduran's fleet! So named because -
h88e6bddbg8fefg449aga199gbb1dd3c1434c: - well... because Balduran travelled far and... saw much.
h91889b80ge148g4ba2g88dbg38378ae8c9e6: But he had finally come home to save the city he loved!
hb29f551ag1c84g49c7g8bedg71fcbd491cb0: He drove the raiders away and raised a wall to protect his people.
h4d0a1fcfg1bdfg4e3fg922egee0cddf93d3b: And so they named the city to honour him. Balduran's - Baldur's Gate.
